hero.tagline: Dance about who we truly are
works.title: Works
works.subtitle: Each production explores what we are when the masks come off.
about.label: About
about.title: Artem Hordieiev
about.role: Ukrainian choreographer and ballet director. Founder of Newspaper Birds Ballet Company.
about.manifesto: Life is a play of actors, characters in given circumstances — a plane, a time. Theatre is reality, a true reflection of this process. But if in life we can wear many masks, conceal, ignore, and suppress — in theatre we will almost always see our true face.
about.bio: Creates contemporary ballet productions where symphonic music meets the truth of the human body. Works at the intersection of the powerful Ukrainian choreographic school and the European stage, offering a bold visual language that contrasts the sterile minimalism of the Berlin dance scene.
about.nbb: Founder of Newspaper Birds Ballet — a contemporary ballet company launching in Berlin, Germany.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: For bookings, collaborations, and press inquiries.
